title: epilobium alsinoides subsp. tenuipes
intro: Epilobium alsinoides subsp. tenuipes, also known as slender willowherb, is a plant species in the family Onagraceae, characterized by its delicate appearance and pink to purple flowers. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Epilobium alsinoides subsp. tenuipes include reducing inflammation and improving urinary health, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer and antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to support urinary tract health and alleviate symptoms of prostatitis and benign prostatic hyperplasia.
